data.title: 国际服炸服13
data.summary: [5/6 (Sat) Temporary Maintenance Notice] We'll be undergoing temporary maintenance on 5/6 (Sat). Mai
data.body:
[5/6 (Sat) Temporary Maintenance Notice]
We'll be undergoing temporary maintenance on 5/6 (Sat).

Maintenance Period: 5/6 (Sat) 09:30 – 11:30 AM (UTC)
Details: https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/104167
※Maintenance times may change based on conditions.

*Please be informed that the reward for temporary maintenance (Pyroxene x240) had been delivered twice to certain accounts due to a temporary system error.
To compensate for this issue, we have delivered the additional Pyroxene x240 to accounts that have received the reward once.
